name: ShellBar
description: Top-level application shell bar. Present on every SAP Fiori screen as the first item in the layout hierarchy. Contains product name, home icon, navigation button, search, notifications, and user profile avatar.

props.name: productName
props.description: The application name displayed in the bar. Always set — never leave empty.

props.name: showNotifications
props.description: Shows the notification bell icon. Set true when the app has a notification center.

props.name: notificationsNumber
props.description: Badge count displayed on the notification bell. Shown only when showNotifications=true.

props.name: showNavButton
props.description: Shows a back navigation button. Use only on detail screens — never on root/home screens.

props.name: showProductSwitcher
props.description: Shows the product switcher grid icon. Use in multi-app enterprise portals only.

props.name: homeIconTooltip
props.description: Tooltip for the home icon. Required for accessibility when homeIcon is set.

events.name: homeIconPressed
events.description: Fired when the home icon is pressed.

events.name: navButtonPressed
events.description: Fired when the back navigation button is pressed.

events.name: notificationsPressed
events.description: Fired when the notification bell icon is pressed.

events.name: productSwitcherPressed
events.description: Fired when the product switcher icon is pressed.

slots.name: profile
slots.description: User profile avatar displayed on the right side of the shell bar.

slots.name: searchManager
slots.description: Search input. Required when the app has global search.

slots.name: additionalContent
slots.description: Additional action buttons placed before the profile avatar.

notes: ShellBar is always the topmost element in the hierarchy — first item in hierarchy[], never inside any page container.
Exactly one ShellBar per screen frame.
ShellBar height is always 44px in both Cozy and Compact density modes.
Background color is sapShellColor (dark blue-gray) — this is a fixed SAP brand requirement, never override.

keyboard: Tab — move focus through interactive elements
notes: homeIconTooltip must be set when homeIcon is present.
Icon-only buttons in additionalContent must have tooltip set.
notificationsNumber value is announced by screen readers when bell is focused.

examples.title: Standard enterprise ShellBar
whenToUse: On every SAP Fiori screen as the top-level application shell
When the app requires notifications, search, or product switching
whenNotToUse: Never omit — every SAP Fiori screen has exactly one ShellBar
Never use sap.m.Bar or a custom frame as a substitute
